meta.model: Generic 4-axis CNC with LinuxCNC controller and A-axis rotary table. Common on converted Bridgeport mills, custom routers, and plasma/laser builds. Adjust work area, feed limits, and spindle speed to match your INI configuration. Generated G-code uses linuxcnc_4axis dialect. Verify against your LinuxCNC HAL/INI config and run an air cut first.
